case_title: MICHELE CHOW VS. JONATHAN CHI CHOW

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE CHOW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN CHI CHOW IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, MICHELE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, JONATHAN CHI HO DBA PERPETUAL GARAGE DOORS $6,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,690.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
